---
name: Suggest a Prompt
about: Suggest a new lab scenario you'd like to see in the library
title: "[Suggest] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What scenario should the prompt cover?**
A clear description of the network topology, protocols, or use case.

**Why is this valuable?**
What learning objective or real-world problem does it address?

**Vendors involved**
Which vendor OSes (Cisco IOL, Juniper cRPD, Arista cEOS, Nokia SR Linux, Palo Alto, Fortinet, FRR)?

**Difficulty level**
⭐ Beginner / ⭐⭐ Intermediate / ⭐⭐⭐ Advanced

**Are you willing to write the prompt yourself?**
Yes / No — both are fine. If yes, see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
